diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -138,13 +138,13 @@
         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

         

-        # ASPP module

-        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Fixed: Pass x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

+        # ASPP on deepest features (x4 from layer4)

+        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Fixed: was x3, now x4

         

-        # Decoder module - using low-level features from layer1

-        out = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # x1 has 256 channels as expected by decoder

+        # Decoder with skip connection from layer1

+        x = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # x1 has the low-level features from layer1

         

         # Upsample to original input size

-        out = F.interpolate(out, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        x = F.interpolate(x, size=(x0.shape[2], x0.shape[3]), mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

-        return out
+        return x
